data.title: XLM shows most bullish chart in crypto, with high correlation coefficient above 0.70 with XRP during bull runs. Will history repeat?
data.description: In past bull markets, XLM and XRP frequently demonstrate a strong correlation, often with a correlation coefficient exceeding 0.70. The question now is whether Stellar will follow suit this time around.

data.title: Shara Castillo named VP & Integrated Design and Advisory - Architecture Design Principal at Michael Baker International, driving strategic growth & excellence.
data.description: Ms. Castillo has been appointed to enhance architecture design quality, strategic expansion, and transformative progress throughout various sectors, regions, and locations. The announcement was made in Pittsburgh on July 18, 2025. Michael Baker International, a prominent player in engineering, consulting, and technology solutions, disclosed the news today.

data.title: Coop Pank revealed Q2 2025 results in a webinar 18 July, 9 am EET, with Heikko Mäe and Paavo Truu presenting.
data.description: Coop Pank conducted an investor webinar on Friday, July 18, 2025, at 9 am (EET), presented by Heikko Mäe, the Interim Chairman of the Management Board, and Paavo Truu, the Chief Financial Officer. The webinar, conducted in Estonian, unveiled the unaudited financial outcomes for the Second Quarter of 2025.

data.title: Golden Gate Sotheby's welcomes Robert Brisbane as VP Sales, East Bay, boosting leadership in Contra Costa and Alameda counties.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in San Francisco, Golden Gate Sotheby's International Realty revealed the appointment of Robert Brisbane as the Vice President of Sales for the East Bay region. This move signifies a boost in the company's focus and resources towards Contra Costa and Alameda counties. Brisbane's addition to the team aims to enhance the brokerage's presence in the area, tapping into the potential of the market.

data.title: Philippines construction industry set to grow by 6.2% in 2025, boosted by investments in transport and renewable energy.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "The Philippines Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector - Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional and Residential Market Analysis to 2029 (Q2 2025)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in the Philippines is projected to experience a real growth of 6.2% in 2025. This growth is backed by investments from both the public and private sectors aimed at enhancing transport infrastructure and renewable energy projects.

data.title: Premium Catering (Holdings) Limited announces 18,652,750 Class A Ordinary Shares, to be consolidated to 2,072,528 post-split.
data.description: Singapore, July 18, 2025 - Premium Catering (Holdings) Limited (Nasdaq: PC) has announced a Share Consolidation ("Reverse Split") of its Class A Ordinary Shares on July 11, 2025. The Reverse Stock Split will be at a ratio of 1:9 with a record date of July 21, 2025. Starting from July 22, 2025, the Class A Ordinary Shares will trade on a Reverse Stock Split adjusted basis on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "PC". Currently, there are 18,652,750 Class A Ordinary Shares issued and outstanding, which will be reduced to 2,072,528 after the Reverse Stock Split.

data.title: DFDV Treasury Accelerator by Solana-listed DeFi Development starts global expansion with Kraken and leading VCs' support. #franchise #cryptocurrency
data.description: A company called DeFi Development, which is listed on the Nasdaq and operates as a Solana treasury business, has introduced the DFDV Treasury Accelerator. This initiative aims to achieve global expansion through a franchise approach. DeFi Development has teamed up with Kraken and prominent virtual currency venture capitalists to support this endeavor.

data.title: Hilb Group acquires Kentucky insurance agency to expand its services, increasing presence in Midwest/Central regions.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Richmond-based company The Hilb Group revealed the acquisition of a Kentucky-based multi-line insurance agency. The transaction, which was finalized on July 1, 2025, marks a significant expansion of the company's services and offerings across the Midwest and Central regions.

data.title: Capstone Green Energy gets new order for C600 microturbine in Mexico, for packaging manufacturer, through DTC Machinery.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (CGEH) and Capstone Green Energy, LLC revealed a fresh deal for a natural gas-fueled Capstone C600 Signature Series microturbine. The turbine is slated for installation at a packaging plant in Mexico. The distributor, DTC Machinery, exclusively represents Capstone in several regions including Mexico, Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, and Panamá. The undisclosed customer, a prominent company, placed the order for the turbine.
Chevron's CEO states that the Trump administration regards U.S. energy as a valuable resource. The administration views energy as a key asset.

data.title: Sungrow introduces new residential ESS in Vietnam on July 18, 2025, providing reliable backup power.
data.description: A new residential energy storage system has been revealed by Sungrow in PHU QUOC ISLAND, Vietnam on July 18, 2025. As a top provider of PV inverters and energy storage systems globally, Sungrow introduced its latest ESS model at the 2025 Southeast Asia Distribution event. This next-generation system aims to offer reliable backup power.

data.title: Roundhouse Provisions Basecamp Complete wins "Meal Replacement Product of the Year" at 2025 Mindful Awards; a plant-based nutrition shake approved by Chuck Norris, renowned for convenience, taste, and balance.
data.description: Chuck Norris-endorsed plant-based nutrition shake hailed for its convenient, delicious, and balanced formula. Founded by the iconic actor, Roundhouse Provisions® has gained recognition for its exceptional qualities. The product is gaining popularity as a go-to option for health-conscious consumers. The news was announced on July 18, 2025, in Houston.

data.title: MBAK Energy Solutions showcases expansion at Battery Show Asia with comprehensive battery industry approach.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on July 18, 2025, MBAK, now operating under a new name, is broadening its operations in Seoul, South Korea; Shenzhen, China; and Wilmington, North Carolina. The company is extending its focus within the battery sector to incorporate a holistic strategy. This involves involvement in the complete process of battery production from design to development, emphasizing a more comprehensive approach.
South Korea: Yoon Ho-joong, candidate for Minister of the Interior and Safety, has his confirmation report adopted through bipartisan agreement

data.title: Thumzup Media, backed by Donald Trump Jr., approves $250M for Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, SOL, Dogecoin. Trend of Trump-aligned businesses adopting crypto.
data.description: Thumzup Media Corporation, traded as TZUP on NASDAQ and supported by Donald Trump Jr., has been granted approval by its board to invest up to $250 million in cryptocurrencies. The company can now diversify its holdings to include Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), Ripple (XRP), Dogecoin (DOGE), Litecoin (LTC), and USDC (USDC). This shift in investment strategy is in line with a trend where Trump-associated firms are increasingly adopting digital assets as part of their treasury plans. CEO Robert Steele attributed the decision to evolving financial landscapes.
